#Generated by VisualGDB project wizard.
#Note: VisualGDB will automatically update this file when you add new sources to the project.

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 2.7)
project(cmrtdb)
set(LIBRARIES_FROM_REFERENCES "")
add_library(cmrtdb SHARED cmrtdb.c rbtree.c mrtdb_index.c mrtdb_format.c cJSON.c mrtdb_load.c list.h mrtdb_index.h rbtree.h mrtdb_format.h cJSON.h mrtdb_load.h mrtdb_query.c mrtdb_query.h)
target_link_libraries(cmrtdb "${LIBRARIES_FROM_REFERENCES}")
set_property(TARGET cmrtdb PROPERTY C_STANDARD 99)
